title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
